label: modes_no_args
stdout:
Usage: python -m thoth modes [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  List research modes with provider/model/kind.

Options:
  -h, --help  Show this message and exit.

Commands:
  add            `thoth modes add` — see `thoth help modes` for examples.
  copy           `thoth modes copy` — see `thoth help modes` for examples.
  list           List research modes.
  remove         `thoth modes remove` — see `thoth help modes` for examples.
  rename         `thoth modes rename` — see `thoth help modes` for examples.
  set            `thoth modes set` — see `thoth help modes` for examples.
  set-default    `thoth modes set-default` — see `thoth help modes` for...
  unset          `thoth modes unset` — see `thoth help modes` for examples.
  unset-default  `thoth modes unset-default` — see `thoth help modes` for...

  Mutation operations:
    thoth modes add NAME --model MODEL [--description D] [--kind K]
    thoth modes set NAME KEY VALUE
    thoth modes unset NAME KEY
    thoth modes remove NAME
    thoth modes rename OLD NEW
    thoth modes copy SRC DST [--from-profile X] [--override]
    thoth modes set-default NAME
    thoth modes unset-default

  All mutators support: --project | --config PATH | --profile X | --json. Use
  --override with add/copy to create a builtin-name override in the selected
  tier.
